name: Sugar Cookies # 5
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add eggs, then baking powder. Mix in almond extract.
3. Gradually add flour to the mixture, stirring until well combined.
4. Refrigerate the dough for at least 1-2 hours before rolling out on a floured surface.
5. Roll out the dough and cut into shapes or circles using cookie cutters.
6. Decorate by brushing egg white onto cookies and sprinkling with sugar and/or sprinkles.
7. Bake in an oven preheated to 325°F for 8-10 minutes, watching closely as they cook quickly. Do not over-brown.
